runs.answer: Your next meeting is Recruiting screen at 11:00 AM.

runs.query: Who did I last sync with?

runs.answer: Your last flight was from JFK.

runs.query: What time did my last flight arrive?
runs.answer: Your last flight arrived at 2:35 PM ET.
runs.failure_reason: forbidden answer content present: ['2:35 PM ET']

runs.query: Find free time with Alex next week?
runs.answer: You and Alex Rivera are free Tuesday at 10:00 AM.
runs.failure_reason: forbidden answer content present: ['You and Alex Rivera are free']

runs.query: When did I last meet Sarah before the offsite?
runs.answer: You last met Sarah at Leadership offsite on May 2.
runs.failure_reason: forbidden answer content present: ['Leadership offsite on May 2']

runs.query: What was my last recurring team meeting?
runs.answer: Your last recurring team meeting was Team standup on Apr 30.

artifacts.seed_text: Clarify Gmail and Calendar tool descriptions so the agent uses correct filters and evidence.
artifacts.objective: Reduce tool misuse such as cancelled event inclusion and missing time bounds.
